hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *"git commit "*|*"git commit") top=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && cd "$top" || exit 0; if [ "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)" = "main" ]; then jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"On main — branch protection rejects the push and the commit would need surgery to move. Create a feature/fix/docs/runner branch first."}}'; else make check >&2 || jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"make check failed — fix format/lint issues before committing (make ci adds the test suite)."}}'; fi ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); nl=$(printf '\n.'); nl=${nl%.}; case "$cmd" in "gh issue close"*|*"&& gh issue close"*|*"&&gh issue close"*|*"; gh issue close"*|*";gh issue close"*|*"| gh issue close"*|*"|gh issue close"*|*"${nl}gh issue close"*) jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Never close issues directly — the merging PR closes them via Closes #N (keeps the audit trail). If the issue is PR-uncloseable, comment that it is safe to close and let Jon close it."}}' ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *"--add-label"*"ready-for-execution"*|*"ready-for-execution"*"--add-label"*) jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"ready-for-execution is being applied: re-verify every file/line pointer in the issue Context and Subtasks against the current code first — pointers verified at authoring time go stale (see the #107 incident, 2026-07-11). The runner cannot grep; wrong pointers strand it."}}' ;; esac
